# DEA-C01 Mock Exam Sources

> **No fabricated questions. This course does not reproduce exam content.** This file lists official AWS practice resources and describes the mock exam materials available for DEA-C01 preparation.

## Official AWS practice resources

- **Official AWS practice question set (DEA-C01)** — available free on AWS Skill Builder. Requires an AWS Builder ID login. See the certification product page: [AWS Certified Data Engineer - Associate](https://aws.amazon.com/certification/certified-data-engineer-associate/).
- **AWS Skill Builder subscription** — [AWS Skill Builder](https://skillbuilder.aws/) offers an Official Pretest for DEA-C01 under the paid Individual subscription. Coverage and pricing vary by region; confirm before enrolling.
- **AWS Certification Official Practice Question Sets** — accessible from the AWS Certification portal once you register: [AWS Certification portal](https://www.aws.training/certification).
- **[AWS DEA-C01 Exam Guide](https://aws.amazon.com/certification/certified-data-engineer-associate/)** — Re-read before booking; the guide explicitly defines every skill statement that is in scope.
- **AWS Ramp-Up Guide: Data Engineer** — curated learning path. Search "AWS Ramp-Up Guide Data Engineer" on [AWS Training and Certification](https://aws.amazon.com/training/).

## Mock exam sets

Two mock exam sets were developed as part of the DEA-C01 study plan:

- **Mock exam set 1** — covers all four domains with scenario-based questions weighted to match the exam blueprint.
- **Mock exam set 2** — a second full-length practice exam for weak-area remediation after reviewing set 1 results.

Each module in this branch also ships a short `quiz.md` (8-10 questions) with primary-source cites; these are formative, not summative, and should not be used as a pass/fail proxy.

## What this branch does NOT provide

- **No original mock exam questions** written for the DEA-C01 exam.
- **No reproduction of AWS exam content**, paraphrased or otherwise.
- **No "brain dump" style content** from third-party dump sites — these violate the AWS Certification NDA and are rejected under the unified course reuse policy.

## Recommended use

1. After finishing modules 01-06, take mock exam set 1 under timed conditions.
2. Review wrong answers and jump back to the cited module section.
3. Take the AWS official practice set on Skill Builder.
4. Take mock exam set 2.
5. If you score >=75% on both sibling mocks and the AWS official practice, schedule the real exam.

## Policy note

Per the unified course reuse policy, acceptable sources for this branch are AWS official docs, the [AWS DEA-C01 Exam Guide](https://aws.amazon.com/certification/certified-data-engineer-associate/), and canonical books. Blogs, Medium posts, brain dumps, and third-party "practice exams" that are not endorsed by AWS are rejected.
